title: action-comments step input
description: CLI args contract for the action-comments skill (what build_step_args produces in workflow step mode).

base_path.description: Base output path: reads prior-step artifacts and writes the step-result.json sidecar under <base_path>/action-comments/

pr.description: PR/MR URL. Optional — auto-detected from the current branch when omitted.

ci.description: Force autonomous CI mode. When unset, CI is auto-detected from the CI/GITHUB_ACTIONS/GITLAB_CI env vars.
